prestazioni: Engine swap to the Nissan VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 400hp stock) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 272° camshaft kit for extended powerband (7,000 RPM redline). Pair with a Nismo 350Z GT-Spec intercooler (core dimensions: 24.5" x 10.5" x 3.5") and a custom 3.5" titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with 4-2-1 equal-length headers and a 304 stainless steel muffler.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) for the rear differential, Nismo carbon driveshaft (1.5kg weight reduction), and a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch with cerametallic friction material (rated for 600 lb-ft torque). Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm drop) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms.

ECU recalibration via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone unit with flex-fuel compatibility (E85 mapping), paired with a Link G4+ Monsoon for auxiliary sensor logging (wideband AFR, EGT, boost pressure). Fuel system upgrade includes a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (adjustable base pressure: 43.5-72.5 psi).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny X-Trail GT widebody kit (PU-01, 3-piece fender flares with 50mm extended wheel arches) in raw carbon fiber, paired with a custom front splitter by Seibon Carbon (3D-scanned for OEM+ fitment) and a GT-wing by Voltex (Type-7, 1700mm span, 300mm chord, 3D-printed aluminum mounts).

OEM+ aggressive styling: Nissan Nismo S-Tune grille (painted matte black with red accents), JDM-spec X-Trail GT headlights (LED projectors with sequential turn signals, smoked lenses), and a custom rear diffuser by Varis (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated exhaust cutouts).

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x10.5 +15 ET front, 19x11.5 +20 ET rear) in gloss black with red lip, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Brake system: AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
